description_long: This house features a modern, rectangular layout with clean white exterior walls and flat roof sections. The property is surrounded by a low boundary wall and includes landscaped green areas with several trees and shrubs, providing a touch of nature. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically along the facade, allowing for ample natural light inside. The main entryway is recessed and partially sheltered by a small overhang, with a paved path leading up to it. The backyard and side yards are open and grassy, offering outdoor living space. The overall design is minimalist, with a focus on geometric forms and functional outdoor areas.
description: A modern, white, flat-roofed house with asymmetrical windows, landscaped green areas, and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entryway, a paved path, and landscaped greenery with trees near the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the elongated layout, multiple windows, and extensive green spaces on both sides.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the backyard area, additional windows, and the continuation of the boundary wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays more green space, trees, and the overall rectangular structure of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a small overhang, paved path, and minimal decorative elements
